age_limit.details: The state government provides certain concessions and priorities under this Anganwadi recruitment process. Understanding these provisions helps candidates assess their eligibility more accurately. | SC/ST Category Reservation: Priority will be given to applicants from Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes as per applicable government rules. Widow Applicants: Widows of Gram Panchayat officials, municipality employees, or their family members - supported by a government-issued death certificate - are given reservation benefits. Divorcee/Separated Women: As per government norms, eligible divorced or separated women may also apply. Age Calculation Date: Age is calculated as on 01 January 2026 .

The following conditions are mandatory for all applicants for the Lalitpur Anganwadi Karyakatri posts. | Only women candidates are eligible to apply for designated Anganwadi Worker posts. Applicants must be permanent residents of the ward or Gram Sabha of the post applied for. For urban area vacancies, applicants must be permanent residents of the concerned ward, as verified through the urban body's records. Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years (as of January 1, 2026 cut-off date) | The minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (Class 12 / 10+2) or its equivalent. The maximum educational qualification also considered is equivalent to Intermediate - meaning merit is prepared based on education up to this level. Selection is merit-based, determined by educational qualifications. | Residence and caste certificates must be obtained from the Tehsil (Revenue) office and verified with an online digital signature. Certificates with online authentication are considered valid.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per UP Government rules for Anganwadi Karyakatri (honorarium-based)

etc.). Final Authority: The final decision on recruitment (increase or decrease in vacancies) rests with the Selection Committee. No Walk-in Interviews: Candidates will not be called for in-person selection without prior merit list publication.
how_to_apply: The online application process for Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is straightforward. All eligible women must follow these steps to submit their applications successfully.
Visit the official portal: Go to https://www.upanganwadibharti.in
Find the notification: Search for Lalitpur district under the Anganwadi Worker vacancy section.
Register and fill the form: Complete the application form carefully with all required personal, educational, and residential details.
Upload documents: Attach self-attested copies of required documents.
Submit online: Submit your application within the deadline. No offline/postal applications are accepted.
Important: Applications submitted via offline mode, post, or courier will not be accepted. Only online applications through the official UP Anganwadi portal are valid.
important_instructions: The following special directions are issued as part of the official notification and must be followed carefully by all applicants for Lalitpur Anganwadi Worker posts.

Only women candidates are eligible. Men cannot apply. Minimum education: Intermediate (Class 12); maximum education considered for merit: Intermediate or equivalent. Permanent residency of the Gram Sabha / Ward of the applied post is mandatory. Residence and caste certificates must have Tehsil-issued online digital signatures to be valid. Minimum age 18 years, maximum 35 years, calculated as on January 1, 2026. BC/OBC category applicants will be evaluated as per Government Order No. 22/2015/2123/26-2-2015, dated September 14, 2015 (as amended), and Social Welfare Department Anupam-2 regulations. Income certificates must conform to standards set by the Rajaswa Anubhag-9 Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9, dated September 30, 2011 (as amended), and must be digitally verifiable. Widows must submit a death certificate of the deceased husband, issued by the Gram Panchayat officer or relevant urban body. Talaqshuda (divorced) and retired employees certificates must be as per applicable government orders. Only departmental website https://www.upanganwadibharti.in should be used for online applications. No third-party sites are valid. Applicants must fill the online form carefully and correctly before submission. The self-attested copy submitted must be uploaded to the portal. Applications with wrong/missing documents or incorrect details will be rejected without notice. Last date: July 9, 2026, midnight 12:00 AM. Detailed instructions, eligibility criteria, and the application form are available on the UP Anganwadi Bharti official website. The number of vacancies may change - final recruitment decisions rest with the selection committee.

content_sections.heading: Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Official Notification
content_sections.text: The Office of the District Program Officer (Zila Karyakram Adhikari), Lalitpur, Uttar Pradesh has released an official recruitment notification for filling 75 vacant Anganwadi Worker (Anganwadi Karyakatri) posts under various Child Development Project (Bal Vikas Pariyojana) areas across Lalitpur district. This notification is issued under Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687), dated September 17, 2025, in line with the state government directive for Anganwadi recruitment under Shasan Aadesh Sankhya-1. Eligible women candidates who wish to apply online for Lalitpur Anganwadi vacancy 2026 can submit their applications through the official UP Anganwadi portal at https://www.upanganwadibharti.in on or before the last date. Download Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 PDF

content_sections.heading: Lalitpur Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Daily Current Affairs 22 June 2026: Download Free PDF Now

rows.up_anganwadi: As per UP Government rules for Anganwadi Karyakatri (honorarium-based)
Village/Ward-level Anganwadi Worker (not a regular government employment)
Online only at http://upanganwadibharti.in (no offline / postal applications accepted)
Merit-based on combined marks of Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation (combined total). Tie-break: higher age, then higher educational qualification.
Candidate must be resident of the same Ward / Gram Sabha where the vacancy exists. If no eligible candidate from the same Gram Sabha, selection from the concerned Nyaya Panchayat.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details - Project-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: This section provides the complete district-wise and project-wise vacancy distribution for the Lalitpur Anganwadi Karyakatri Bharti 2026, covering both rural (Gramin) and urban (Shahari) areas. Key Highlight: The highest number of vacancies (16 posts) are available in the Mandavara project, followed by Talbehat (14 posts) and Jakhaura (12 posts).

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for Lalitpur Anganwadi Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Before applying, candidates must carefully review the eligibility requirements. The following conditions are mandatory for all applicants for the Lalitpur Anganwadi Karyakatri posts. Only women candidates are eligible to apply for designated Anganwadi Worker posts. Applicants must be permanent residents of the ward or Gram Sabha of the post applied for. For urban area vacancies, applicants must be permanent residents of the concerned ward , as verified through the urban body's records. Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years (as of January 1, 2026 cut-off date) The minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (Class 12 / 10+2) or its equivalent. The maximum educational qualification also considered is equivalent to Intermediate - meaning merit is prepared based on education up to this level. Selection is merit-based, determined by educational qualifications. Residence and caste certificates must be obtained from the Tehsil (Revenue) office and verified with an online digital signature . Certificates with online authentication are considered valid.

content_sections.heading: Age Relaxation and Reservation Policy
content_sections.text: The state government provides certain concessions and priorities under this Anganwadi recruitment process. Understanding these provisions helps candidates assess their eligibility more accurately. SC/ST Category Reservation: Priority will be given to applicants from Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes as per applicable government rules. Widow Applicants: Widows of Gram Panchayat officials, municipality employees, or their family members - supported by a government-issued death certificate - are given reservation benefits. Divorcee/Separated Women: As per government norms, eligible divorced or separated women may also apply. Age Calculation Date: Age is calculated as on 01 January 2026 .

content_sections.heading: Application Process - How to Apply Online
content_sections.text: The online application process for Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is straightforward. All eligible women must follow these steps to submit their applications successfully. Visit the official portal: Go to https://www.upanganwadibharti.in Find the notification: Search for Lalitpur district under the Anganwadi Worker vacancy section. Register and fill the form: Complete the application form carefully with all required personal, educational, and residential details. Upload documents: Attach self-attested copies of required documents. Submit online: Submit your application within the deadline. No offline/postal applications are accepted. Important: Applications submitted via offline mode, post, or courier will not be accepted. Only online applications through the official UP Anganwadi portal are valid.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for Application
content_sections.text: Candidates should keep the following documents ready before starting the online application for UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026. Residential/Domicile Certificate (Tehsil-issued, digitally signed) Caste Certificate (Tehsil-issued, digitally signed online) Educational Certificates (Intermediate marksheet and certificate) Age Proof (Birth certificate or school leaving certificate) Income Certificate (if applicable) Widow/Divorcee Certificate (if applicable - must be government-issued) Aadhar Card / Identity Proof Recent Passport-size Photograph All documents must be self-attested before uploading. Any false information, incorrect documents, or incomplete applications may result in immediate disqualification .

content_sections.heading: Important Dates - Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Keeping track of important dates is crucial to avoid missing the application window. Here are all the critical deadlines for this recruitment cycle. Note: The last date to submit the online application is July 9, 2026 by 12:00 midnight. Applications submitted after this time will not be accepted under any circumstances. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Selection Process - Merit-Based Recruitment
content_sections.text: The Lalitpur Anganwadi Karyakatri selection process is transparent and entirely merit-based. No written examination or interview is conducted at the initial stage. Merit List Preparation: A merit list will be prepared based on educational qualifications of the applicants. Preference Criteria: Among equally qualified candidates, preference will be given based on domicile status, category (SC/ST), and special conditions (widow, divorcee, etc.). Final Authority: The final decision on recruitment (increase or decrease in vacancies) rests with the Selection Committee . No Walk-in Interviews: Candidates will not be called for in-person selection without prior merit list publication.

content_sections.heading: Where to Get More Information
content_sections.text: For complete eligibility details, application format, reservation policy, and area-wise vacancy information, candidates can access information through the following official sources: Official Recruitment Portal: https://www.upanganwadibharti.in District Program Officer Office: District Child Development Office, Lalitpur Notice Boards: Gram Panchayat offices, Block Development offices, Collectorate building, and Lalitpur Vikas Bhawan Full details including ward-wise and Gram Sabha-wise vacancy lists have been published on the Collectorate, Development Building, Block Office, and Tehsil notice boards of Lalitpur district.

content_sections.heading: Special Instructions for Applicants
content_sections.text: The following special directions are issued as part of the official notification and must be followed carefully by all applicants for Lalitpur Anganwadi Worker posts. Only women candidates are eligible. Men cannot apply. Minimum education: Intermediate (Class 12) ; maximum education considered for merit: Intermediate or equivalent. Permanent residency of the Gram Sabha / Ward of the applied post is mandatory. Residence and caste certificates must have Tehsil-issued online digital signatures to be valid. Minimum age 18 years, maximum 35 years , calculated as on January 1, 2026. BC/OBC category applicants will be evaluated as per Government Order No. 22/2015/2123/26-2-2015, dated September 14, 2015 (as amended), and Social Welfare Department Anupam-2 regulations. Income certificates must conform to standards set by the Rajaswa Anubhag-9 Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9 , dated September 30, 2011 (as amended), and must be digitally verifiable. Widows must submit a death certificate of the deceased husband, issued by the Gram Panchayat officer or relevant urban body. Talaqshuda (divorced) and retired employees certificates must be as per applicable government orders. Only departmental website https://www.upanganwadibharti.in should be used for online applications. No third-party sites are valid. Applicants must fill the online form carefully and correctly before submission. The self-attested copy submitted must be uploaded to the portal. Applications with wrong/missing documents or incorrect details will be rejected without notice . Last date: July 9, 2026, midnight 12:00 AM. Detailed instructions, eligibility criteria, and the application form are available on the UP Anganwadi Bharti official website. The number of vacancies may change - final recruitment decisions rest with the selection committee.

faq.question: Q1. How many total vacancies are available in Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 75 Anganwadi Worker (Karyakatri) vacancies across 7 Child Development Projects in Lalitpur district — 6 rural projects and 1 urban project.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Lalitpur Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is July 9, 2026, by midnight (12:00 AM). Applications after this deadline will not be considered.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for Lalitpur Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: Only women candidates who are permanent residents of the respective ward or Gram Sabha are eligible. The minimum age is 18 years and maximum is 35 years (as of January 1, 2026). Minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (Class 12).

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for Lalitpur Anganwadi Worker vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only through the official portal https://www.upanganwadibharti.in. Offline or postal applications are not accepted.

faq.question: Q5. Which project has the most vacancies in Lalitpur Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Mandavara Child Development Project has the highest number of vacancies with 16 posts, followed by Talbehat (14 posts) and Jakhaura (12 posts).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any written exam for Lalitpur Anganwadi Karyakatri selection?
faq.answer: No written examination is conducted. Selection is merit-based, determined by the candidate's educational qualifications and applicable reservation criteria.

faq.question: Q7. Are residence and caste certificates mandatory for Lalitpur Anganwadi application?
faq.answer: Yes. Both residence and caste certificates are mandatory and must be issued by the Tehsil office with an online digital signature to be considered valid.

faq.question: Q8. What happens if a candidate submits incorrect or false documents?
faq.answer: Applications with false information, incorrect certificates, or incomplete documents will be summarily rejected and the applicant will be disqualified from the selection process.
